gaps.snippet: # [doc = " A simple, append-only **error-class registry** (RFC-0013 §4.5 / X1)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " A class name is resolved only if it has been explicitly registered; unregistered names return"] # [doc = " [`UnknownClass`] — never a silent fabrication (G2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Design note"] # [doc = " This is the Rust-first scoped form of the shared registry that `std.diag` (M-510) owns in the"] # [doc = " full runtime. The M-510 leaf will provide the canonical form; this one lives here so"] # [doc = " `std.recover` is buildable and testable in isolation. FLAG to orchestrator: integration seam"] # [doc = " between `mycelium-std-diag`'s `ClassRegistry` and this one must be reconciled once M-510"] # [doc = " lands."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , Default)] pub struct ClassRegistry { names : BTreeSet < String > , }

gaps.snippet: impl ClassRegistry { # [doc = " An empty registry (no classes registered yet)."] # [must_use] pub fn new () -> Self { ClassRegistry :: default () } # [doc = " Register a class name. Idempotent — registering the same name twice is a no-op."] pub fn register (& mut self , name : impl Into < String >) { self . names . insert (name . into ()) ; } # [doc = " Builder: register a name."] # [must_use] pub fn with (mut self , name : impl Into < String >) -> Self { self . register (name) ; self } # [doc = " Resolve a string to a [`ClassName`] if it is registered."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " Returns [`UnknownClass`] if `name` is not in the registry (X1 — never an eval'd string)."] pub fn resolve (& self , name : & str) -> Result < ClassName , UnknownClass > { if self . names . contains (name) { Ok (ClassName (name . to_owned ())) } else { Err (UnknownClass { name : name . to_owned () , }) } } # [doc = " Whether a name is registered."] # [must_use] pub fn contains (& self , name : & str) -> bool { self . names . contains (name) } }
